name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily
body:
Everything White House for 4/03/2017. |

**FEATURED**
Watch President Donald J. Trump's Weekly Address to the Nation.
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c9ffb98ba9a76d1c1e13b6c2decd761a3bae34ccd62232da09268983cea22a8123aa8d1d4276a85400e8c9c7b807206fa2b5421f1fa8276c)

**WHITE HOUSE MEMO**
President Trump's top priorities are keeping the American people safe and our homeland secure. Today he is welcoming Egyptian President Abdel Fattah Al Sisi to the White House, strengthening the United States' relationship with a key ally in the fight against ISIS and other terrorist groups.

**MORNING:**
* **11:50AM** : President Trump welcomes President Abdel Fattah Al Sisi of Egypt
* **11:55AM** : President Trump meets with President Al Sisi

**AFTERNOON:**
* **12:10PM** : President Trump leads an extended bilateral meeting with President Al Sisi
* **1:10PM** : President Trump has a working luncheon with President Al Sisi
* **2:30PM** : President Trump meets with Secretary of State Rex Tillerson

**GET INVOLVED**
Today, the Senate Judiciary Committee votes on Judge Neil Gorsuch's nomination for Supreme Court Justice to advance it to the Senate floor. Stand with Judge Gorsuch and demand that the Senate confirm him.
[Confirm Judge Gorsuch. Sign the Petition.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c9ffb98ba9a76d1c1ef3f59bd94e23506fbb9a1c78b615fcbf49fdba6f5068d469f9f84277db2c67e83216c6d7a627b8803266821e33edcf)

**OVAL OFFICE HIGHLIGHTS**
President Trump leads a listening session with the National Association of Manufacturers.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c9ffb98ba9a76d1c9f79a3019ae4fd5e5387ee18fce45532561ae4b067f7a43a676fd3fcf1c92cd7e30e0e522ededcb115c32927789fde39)
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c9ffb98ba9a76d1c92ad081ff667891f436b0cb99b4d1b711842f38248d33a2f236b1e6e33dc8c34b4163bdb9cad164b60855e59b76972f3)

President Trump signs an Executive Order Regarding the Omnibus Report on Significant Trade Deficits.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c9ffb98ba9a76d1c403c62706e0178028a6a55b6c57dd70c74ac8c6d734ac0d6acedfb733466c6ca2742577beb8c65499c313680df4aac78)

President Trump signs an Executive Order Establishing Enhanced Collection and Enforcement of Antidumping and Countervailing Duties and Violations of Trade and Customs Laws.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c9ffb98ba9a76d1c079dc54d9097175b0d4e4b52454475871b98dcf0ccac94e33131e86b01e25eae0238d8920fe692d048a7176b22546f22)
[Read President Trump's Remarks](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c9ffb98ba9a76d1ccb68c4b974396f7ab07530958602295b098abd249f63ee05cb724a33b9f9c5d3c789d29b54e2d68d836ba93e99cc5ac7)

**WHITE HOUSE UPDATES**
**Photo of the Day:**
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c9ffb98ba9a76d1cdc8615600ada1dfd961464fcbd50cae317629434e5231a08a294350863256acefb7ec096514d1f48dee9cdd751536600)
The White House is lit in blue in honor of World Autism Awareness Day in Washington D.C., Sunday, April 2, 2017 (Official White House photo by D. Myles Cullen).
[View Photo](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c9ffb98ba9a76d1cdc8615600ada1dfd961464fcbd50cae317629434e5231a08a294350863256acefb7ec096514d1f48dee9cdd751536600)

The Gorsuch Process: Unprecedented Access and Transparency.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c9ffb98ba9a76d1ce9bc19e30a3fd23fe0b3eb80165511542d319e8feed2449f6c294d61b7f62f6b154f229c544b301f7eee77274f4dab10)

Check out a 360-degree view of the Blue Room.

[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c9ffb98ba9a76d1c75d1dae46a5a5312b6185955f2acbf5b0b25a90c5b62f9307dff9d952b7ad53ae85f0f313a8ef0c49dbeb21e148fec2c)

[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c9ffb98ba9a76d1c4bf080a2ffa06ae0a7f0e84d00c2b15c477ed6bc9e8f032626bf54aef389dbea130f045278209fd22a95675da87a60ec)
[Retweet](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c9ffb98ba9a76d1c3685b683792bf71695aec02ae4cf87584e3b70ff160b5b935eb33307ba1dc01b680a28843cec659c955d243145e5f868)

**PRESS ROOM**
Today's press briefing will take place at 2:30PM ET in the White House Briefing Room with Press Secretary Sean Spicer. [Watch it LIVE here.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c9ffb98ba9a76d1cbab5f46ef10c65c1bf83b176ceb42194a8cc848b1687c9084565a2c24c54cb75ecf1e6fb32befde36e2ba6d09e83e015)

**NEWS REPORTS**
* _USA Today:_ "Senate panel to vote on Supreme Court nominee Neil Gorsuch"
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c9ffb98ba9a76d1c21974c98bc26ce46cee91959accf24ca022673ec5136fa3e58175c17444789c9705a0f92682ce8bb3b4918d335f01535)
* _Washington Examiner:_ "Democratic Sen. Joe Donnelly announces support for Gorsuch"
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c9ffb98ba9a76d1cc13488927fb192bd31a827542b9ba442993d0817b270dacdcf751a40f7755d4543773d781e3adc70c7190f6909fc6167)
* _Associated Press:_ "Senate panel to vote on Trump's Supreme Court nominee"
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c9ffb98ba9a76d1cee94f3057c9c1d313d4a1853a963776aa857f5074ea137c75d37796ac9ba86aa0fe106e50e1dab5748bec3c1404f8902)

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c9ffb98ba9a76d1c86487ff09819109f5e25760b869d8b6a20e891ef2ea80d93ec0c79dae245a0fca31298ed86110912e3ae088f1187aeb5) [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=c9ffb98ba9a76d1c306be0d5d178c8b3082ce482f9650f0db0f225e09f87367a7c5bcd390d745596b1ae8b16c5420aeaaec24ced23010c7a)[Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4ef46a5080981032287c62516ecce6180cc6f20cb16f3786d3dbc13577a1edb31c4e198041bc2f3744f610d6a24ceb824)

name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: The Path for Neil Gorsuch
body:
Prayers for Neil Gorsuch

View this email in your browser

Dear Peter,

Neil Gorsuch will likely be our next U.S.
Supreme Court judge. But the path to that seat is not without
conflict and consequence, and it will surely be the major news
story of the week.

The Senate Judiciary Committee will meet
Monday to debate and vote on the nomination. If a majority of the
committee votes to report the nomination (which is expected on
Monday) the nomination will proceed to the full U.S. Senate for a
possible vote on confirmation. The Senate's last day of business
before a scheduled two-week recess is Friday, April 7, and Senate
Majority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-Ky.) has said that the Senate
will vote on Gorsuch's nomination before the recess.

The path to a vote, however, is not without
conflict.

Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.)
has repeatedly said that the Democrats will filibuster the
nomination, not allowing the vote on the Senate floor. Under
current Senate rules, eight Democratic senators would need to
vote in favor of ending debate on the nomination to reach the
long-standing Senate threshold of 60 votes and get past the
expected filibuster. Currently, only three Democrats - Sens. Joe
Donnelly of Indiana, Heidi Heitkamp of North Dakota and Joe
Manchin of West Virginia, all moderates up for reelection next
year - have said they will support the judge from Colorado.
Still, the broad expectation from Democrats is that Gorsuch will
be the first Supreme Court nominee successfully filibustered
since Abe Fortas for chief justice in 1968.

However, should Republicans not be able to
find five additional Democrats willing to vote to end the debate,
Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell has reiterated that he's
prepared to kill the filibuster to get the high court nominee
confirmed. To do so, he would initiate the so-called nuclear
option. This would be a change in the rules to only require a
simple majority vote to move the process forward.

Once debate ends, only a simple majority of
senators would be needed to confirm the nominee.

My Faith Votes has made clear our support for
Judge Gorsuch. We believe America needs judges and justices like
Gorsuch, who will put personal opinions aside to ensure that
American jurisprudence remains anchored in the actual words of
our Constitution, words which have guided us for more than 240
years.

Mostly, we encourage prayer for our country
at this time. The path to the Gorsuch confirmation is likely to
result in further division and anxiety among elected officials,
citizens, and even Christians. But the bible is clear: "Do not be
anxious about anything, but in everything by prayer and
supplication with thanksgiving let your requests be made known to
God" (Philippians 4:6). Our request to God is for the gospel of
Jesus to be shared freely in America and that God be honored in
our nation.

Jason Yates
Chief Executive Officer
My Faith Votes

My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement
focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in
local and national elections and be active members of society. By
partnering with local churches, pastors and national faith
leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and resources Christians to
lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and
politics.

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: Sued
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Attorney General Jeff Sessions and I are putting an end to sanctuary cities. |
[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecgbaBBYiBAH30fCOcWfaEVIiDRMN6aaaaJKQqBMOE23ka?o=8@v~wCy6&Y=jj2crfomA1_mggcr.Wug&r=c&3=&l=6y6x71EXkZ0hj4yUtWzogl44iczckmEXpnEdlWEjEjEbl4k47&jEj)

Friend,

Our terrific Attorney General, Jeff Sessions, has been cracking down on sanctuary cities, __but now the liberal city of Seattle is trying to stop us by suing our Administration.__

Sanctuary cities like Seattle and San Francisco have spent decades breaking our country's immigration laws -- and getting away with it.

Not anymore! _**Not on my watch.**_

But if we want to win this fight, I need you to join the millions of American citizens calling for an immediate end to sanctuary cities.

[**Please sign our Official Petition to Defund Sanctuary Cities.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecgbaBBYiBAH30fCOcWfaEVIiDRMN6aaaaJKQqBMOE23ka?o=8@v~wCy6&Y=jj2crfomA1_mggcr.Wug&r=d&3=&l=6y6x71EXkZ0hj4yUtWzogl44iczckmEXpnEdlWEjEjEbl4k47&jEj)

[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecgbaBBYiBAH30fCOcWfaEVIiDRMN6aaaaJKQqBMOE23ka?o=8@v~wCy6&Y=jj2crfomA1_mggcr.Wug&r=e&3=&l=6y6x71EXkZ0hj4yUtWzogl44iczckmEXpnEdlWEjEjEbl4k47&jEj)

Where is the sanctuary for the _American citizens_ who have been the victims of criminal acts by illegal immigrants?

Where is the sanctuary for the _Americans citizens_ who haven't seen their wages rise in years because of massive illegal immigration?

You -- and millions of Americans like you -- voted to finally put the _American citizens_ FIRST. But we can't do that until we end sanctuary cities that are an assault on the rule of law.

Now I need you to step up and show your support.

[**Sign your name. >>**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecgbaBBYiBAH30fCOcWfaEVIiDRMN6aaaaJKQqBMOE23ka?o=8@v~wCy6&Y=jj2crfomA1_mggcr.Wug&r=a&3=&l=6y6x71EXkZ0hj4yUtWzogl44iczckmEXpnEdlWEjEjEbl4k47&jEj)

[](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecgbaBBYiBAH30fCOcWfaEVIiDRMN6aaaaJKQqBMOE23ka?o=8@v~wCy6&Y=jj2crfomA1_mggcr.Wug&r=b&3=&l=6y6x71EXkZ0hj4yUtWzogl44iczckmEXpnEdlWEjEjEbl4k47&jEj)

Donald J. Trump
President of the United States

[SIGN YOUR NAME](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecgbaBBYiBAH30fCOcWfaEVIiDRMN6aaaaJKQqBMOE23ka?o=8@v~wCy6&Y=jj2crfomA1_mggcr.Wug&r=Z&3=&l=6y6x71EXkZ0hj4yUtWzogl44iczckmEXpnEdlWEjEjEbl4k47&jEj)

name: Team Kasich
subject: The latest
body:
Gov. John Kasich will deliver his annual State of the State
address on Tuesday, April 4th at 7:00PM ET.

Peter, Gov. John Kasich will
deliver his annual State of the State address on Tuesday, April
4th at 7:00PM ET. Please use the information below to watch live
online:

Date: Tuesday, April 4th
Time: 7:00PM ET
Watch online: (here)
Watch on Facebook:
Facebook.com/JohnKasich
Watch on Twitter:
Twitter.com/JohnKasich
Hashtag to use: #OHSotS
--

Last week was full of activity as
Gov. Kasich signed Ohio's transportation budget that maintains
the state's steady progress in improving its highway
infrastructure without raising the gas tax as other states have
been forced to do. It also takes important new steps to position
Ohio to be a leader in the future of transportation: self-driving
cars and drones.

Gov. Kasich also announced new,
strict mandatory limits on opiates used short-term pain in the
Administration's continuing efforts to curb addiction. While
earlier work has already cut opiate prescriptions by 20 percent
and largely eliminated doctor shopping, keeping more people away
from these addictive painkillers are crucial.

The governor also met with a
broad delegation of faith leaders from across the state to
strategize on how they can help in Ohio's fight against drug
abuse and addiction.

Last Monday, the governor was in
Washington, D.C. to meet with members of congress about how to
repair Obamacare, while preserving coverage for the drug
addicted, mentally ill and the working poor. He also encouraged
both sides of the aisle to work together on bring about lasting
reforms. Read more (here).

Governor Kasich also spoke at the
prestigious Toner Prize dinner in Washington, D.C. which
celebrates excellence in political reporting. Past speakers
include President Obama and Vice President Biden. The governor
spoke about the importance of a fair and free press to protecting
our democracy.

Stay tuned for more updates soon
and we hope you're able to tune in to watch the State of the
State Address. Thank you for your support!

-Team Kasich

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

Please use the information below to watch live online: Date: Tuesday, April 4th Time: 7:00PM ET Watch online: (here) Watch on Facebook: Facebook.com/JohnKasich Watch on Twitter: Twitter.com/JohnKasich Hashtag to use: #OHSotS -- Last week was full of activity as Gov. Kasich signed Ohio's transportation budget that maintains the state's steady progress in improving its highway infrastructure without raising the gas tax as other states have been forced to do. It also takes important new steps to position Ohio to be a leader in the future of transportation: self-driving cars and drones. Gov. Kasich also announced new, strict mandatory limits on opiates used short-term pain in the Administration's continuing efforts to curb addiction. While earlier work has already cut opiate prescriptions by 20 percent and largely eliminated doctor shopping, keeping more people away from these addictive painkillers are crucial. The governor also met with a broad delegation of faith leaders from across the state to strategize on how they can help in Ohio's fight against drug abuse and addiction. Last Monday, the governor was in Washington, D.C. to meet with members of congress about how to repair Obamacare, while preserving coverage for the drug addicted, mentally ill and the working poor. He also encouraged both sides of the aisle to work together on bring about lasting reforms. Read more (here). Governor Kasich also spoke at the prestigious Toner Prize dinner in Washington, D.C. which celebrates excellence in political reporting. Past speakers include President Obama and Vice President Biden. The governor spoke about the importance of a fair and free press to protecting our democracy. Stay tuned for more updates soon and we hope you're able to tune in to watch the State of the State Address. Thank you for your support! -Team Kasich Paid for by Kasich for America www.JohnKasich.com This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system July 18, 2015. For more information please follow the URL below: Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out: To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-43042631817-echo3-01EB8F432FDF7EFE4E7A130DA3B24415@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: DNC Rapid Response
subject: re: Donald Trump's nominee (add your name)
body:
Stand with Democrats as we fight back against Trump's SCOTUS nomination
---
**Add your name: join over 200,000 grassroots supporters who have already signed on to tell Senate Republicans to reject Neil Gorsuch:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Reject-Gorsuch1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170403_dnc_nd&source=em_20170403_dnc_nd")**
Friend --

Today, every Republican on the Senate Judiciary Committee voted to move Neil Gorsuch's nomination to the Supreme Court forward.

They took this vote a little over a year after they refused to even hold hearings for President Obama's Supreme Court nominee, Merrick Garland. Instead, they advanced Donald Trump's lifetime nominee even while his campaign is under investigation for its ties to Russia.

Now, that nomination goes to the full Senate for a vote. **[Add your name, and call on the Senate to reject Neil Gorsuch.](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/Reject-Gorsuch1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+and+call+on+the+Senate+to+&utm_campaign=em_20170403_dnc_nd&source=em_20170403_dnc_nd")**

It's no surprise why Donald Trump likes Neil Gorsuch. Gorsuch has consistently favored big corporations and powerful special interests over the rights of working people -- just like Trump. And he would be a rubber stamp for the Trump administration on the Supreme Court.

**We can still stop Neil Gorsuch's confirmation. More than 200,000 grassroots supporters have already signed on to tell Senate Republicans to reject Neil Gorsuch. Add your name to join them now:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Reject-Gorsuch1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170403_dnc_nd&source=em_20170403_dnc_nd")**
Thanks,

The Democrats

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cac9/4067b0a/2ef9c0483/7e7327d7/522228570/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170403_dnc_nd&source=em_20170403_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cac9/4067b0a/2ef9c0483/7e7327d4/522228570/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170403_dnc_nd&source=em_20170403_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cac9/4067b0a/2ef9c0483/7e7327d5/522228570/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170403_dnc_nd&source=em_20170403_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cac9/4067b0a/2ef9c0483/7e7327d2/522228570/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170403_dnc_nd&source=em_20170403_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Add your name: Time for Medicare-for-all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Last month, we won a very important victory against the Republican health care plan that would have taken away insurance from 24 million Americans, raised premiums for seniors and defunded Planned Parenthood. ￼
But we must be clear. This is just the beginning of our struggle, not the end. Our true goal is not just stopping Republicans from destroying health care. Our goal is guaranteeing health care as a right for all people.
Let me be blunt. The Affordable Care Act has done some very important things for our country. Today, 20 million Americans have health care who did not before the law was passed. We ended the obscenity of people being denied coverage because of pre-existing conditions and we put a cap on how much people with serious illnesses have to pay out of pocket. Progress was made but we can do better -- much better.
**That is why, within a couple of weeks, I am going to be introducing legislation calling for a Medicare-for-all, single-payer program.**
People who cannot afford health care don't deserve to die. We should not be spending far more, per capita, than any other nation for health care or be paying the highest prices in the world for prescription drugs.
I believe now more than ever that the American people are ready to end the national disgrace of being the only major country on earth not to guarantee health care as a right for all of its people. Add your name if you agree.
**[Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of my Medicare-for-all, single-payer health care bill that will guarantee health care as a right for all Americans.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb0a94/43f17890/dc5e928c/6203e4ce/649929160/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/bernie-mfa?source=em170403-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=berniesanders&utm_campaign=medicare-for-all&utm_content=co-sponsor")**
The truth is that the insurance and pharmaceutical companies in this country are bribing the United States Congress. In recent years they have spent billions of dollars in lobbying and campaign contributions to make sure that we maintain a dysfunctional, but profitable, approach to health care. Enough is enough. Now is the time to take them on and do something about it.
They will try to make words like "NATIONAL HEALTH CARE" sound scary.
But the truth is, we already have a very large single-payer system in this country. It's called Medicare and it has succeeded in providing near-universal coverage to Americans over the age 65 and gets high marks from people who are enrolled in the program. I believe we can and should expand it to cover everyone.
I believe the American people are ready for a Medicare-for-all, single-payer system that guarantees health care as a right for all Americans. But getting there will require nothing short of a political revolution in this country. Add your name to say we're in this together.
**[Add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of my Medicare-for-all, single-payer health care bill that will guarantee health care as a right for all Americans.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb0a94/43f17890/dc5e928c/6203e4ce/649929160/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/bernie-mfa?source=em170403-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=berniesanders&utm_campaign=medicare-for-all&utm_content=co-sponsor")**
Today, 28 million of our sisters and brothers are living without health care, while many others have high deductibles and co-payments. Despite the gains under the Affordable Care Act, there is still a major health care crisis in this country.
Our job, together, is to end that.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
U.S. Senator, Vermont
****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb0a94/43f17890/dc5e928c/6203e4ce/649929160/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/bernie-mfa?source=em170403-full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=berniesanders&utm_campaign=medicare-for-all&utm_content=co-sponsor")****
** **
** **
** **
** **

Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb0a94/43f17890/dc5e928c/6203e4cf/649929160/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb0a94/43f17890/dc5e928c/6203e4cc/649929160/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/").
